title: aquilegia vulgaris subvar. platysepala
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris subvar. platysepala, also known as the Platysperma Columbine, is a flowering plant species within the Aquilegia genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris subvar. platysepala include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form to reap its medicinal benefits.
